reviews.review_description:
I have been having quite a depressive episode today, so i decided to try this out and I'll admit that it did help lift me somewhat and I felt encouraged and at peace while watching it. I've just come out of it feeling a bit better than I have been today. So it has definitely helped me!
The words, the atmosphere, the visuals, the music...all help take you on a journey of yourself and nature in such a wonderful way!
Now this isn't a game, and isn't something that is highly replayable, but it is a great value for money experience that is really rewarding! This is something to experience and also something to show family and friends to show the abilities of VR! Though be careful, there are some parts that might be tough for those with photosensitivity.
Also, the file size is quite hefty for what it is. But regardless, it is still awesome! Well done to all of those involved and thank you for lifting my spirits a bit today while I'm struggling in myself. This definitely gave me perspective!

What a pleasurable app.
Ok, it's short and perhaps limited to replay to some players. I played it twice straight off, mostly because I was playing with the settings, which can make a slight difference somewhat.

Can't moan at 4 quid. I will watch again periodically.

reviews.review_title: THIS is what I've been looking for!!
reviews.review_description: I am new to quest 3, got my headset for Christmas. I have numerous health problems and I was looking not for games or stupid wars, shooting people. I was looking for peace and harmony, relaxation and mindfulness. This is a fantastic app! I can't say enough good things about it! I'm addicted!!  I hope the makers come out with new stuff because I'll be all in!
Horrible game it should not be this bad it sucks i hate this game
This is basically a very impressive 15 minute cgi video. Its a must have for any vr user!

I do really like using this after doing a session of fast-paced stuff,  it definitely calms the mind and makes me feel chilled. 
The only criticism is why the rainy playground? it immediately changes my frame of mind, it's so depressing, maybe it's just me, but I feel I have to drop a star as it takes me out of the zone.
An artistic display that can't be experienced in any other way. Not in our reality.
A must have visual experience that will take you on a journey you never knew you needed. Some of the best graphics ive seen on my Q3.

I've been a Oculus/Meta 'standalone vr' user since the Oculus Go.... so through many years and many, *many* games and apps.....and this is the first review I've ever done...... 

This experience is just stunning, with absolutely beautiful visuals, which are very good on a Quest 2 and exceptional on a Quest 3.  It took my breath away at times, and I'll continue to go back every now and then just to experience it all again.  Before I bought it I recognised the style from 'Realms of Flow' which I purchased a month or two ago, and have also enjoyed, but this 12 minute self-contained experience with it's varied 'epic scapes' is simply wonderful. I do hope the creator does more for the Quest.....

I don't understand why these developers find it difficult for them to enter the Italian language applications like this becomes useless without understanding what it says I don't understand why these developers find it difficult for them to enter the Italian language applications like this becomes useless without understanding what it says

It's quite short and replayability is almost non existent once you go through it once.
I don't mind spending a few bucks to support the devs. I appreciate the work they do.

reviews.review_title: Yay! The hi def download is FIXED!
reviews.review_description:
Huge kudos to the responsiveness of the team, because the high definition pack is now standard!

What an exciting (but relaxing) way to chill and/or give someone an idea of the power of VR! I LOVE IT!
If you are looking to experience a poem, then this is for you
A friend of mine gave me this, I saw some videos on YouTube but seeing it in VR was complete different feeling that you should experience at least for once :)
This is a great app, very relaxing and a pleasure to watch. The recent update has made the experience much more enjoyable.

I'd be pissed if it cost a penny more than the $2.99 I paid for it.
Junk
Really immersive, recommended.

You are basically buying a 360 video recording. I was hoping for actual 3d render graphics, but this is not it. It's just a video. You can download the higher quality version of it, worth of 8 GB storage space, but even that isn't any higher than any random vid you can watch on Meta TV. So we give it a pass for artistic direction, but it's just a short video. Nothing more, nothing less.
I tend to like this sort of thing after a bit of herb and I honestly felt so many new feelings and had so many new thoughts about my life. It's a must-see.
Can recommend. The only problem I seem to experience is that I can't download the high quality version. I get "download failed" after finishing two times already

developer_response.body:
Hi thx9000,

Thanks for your review.
The latest update eliminates the need for downloading the big HQ-file in-app by delivering it in parts to the device during installation, since the is a 4GB file size limit on Meta's side. The update also adds three new voice-overs.

If you'd like to reconsider your rating that would of course be much appreciated.

Best regards,
Marc

reviews.review_description: Now this is what VR is about! This took me to another place and I didn’t want to leave. Please make more like this, the artistry and vision of this truly blew me away. Thank you.

Just bought this and a few similar titles today.  They were all excellent, but this was the best.  So much variety in the scenes.  Watched it four times in a row.  I'd watch again, but it's 1am, and I need to get to bed.

Thanks for a great escape!
Too short 🥲
I've been looking f or a higher quality version of this experience since discovering it in the TRIPP app and this delivers.  I've enjoyed watching this when I'm down and need a pick me up.

This is one of the reasons I bought VR. This a relaxing and visually stunning app. While it's not interactive, you won't want to jump around, just sit and enjoy the visuals. The narration is really meaningful and actually helps me get perspective on life. Thanks!
Quite an emotional hit. I definitely will come back to it once in a while to remind myself of the beauty of existence. Thanks for the experience!

Hello, congratulations for the extraordinary work, very stimulating and exciting... I saw it with the quest 3, I was wondering if the graphics I see now is already the ones optimized for the quest 3 or in the future it will be possible to have even more detail from this masterpiece? Again, congratulation keep it up!

I’m new to VR and found the conscious existence meditation within Tripp at first 

But the quality of this version is just another level. I’m totally mind blown and really hope that Marc Zimmermann will keep surprising us with more 

I totally recommend this to anyone who loves to escape reality after a busy day and wants to connect with another realm

I've logged thousands of hours in VR since 2016 and I recommend Conscious Existence to everyone I meet. If you have PCVR, the developer also has an app called "Deep States VR" on Steam that I recommend as well. It's interactive environments with real-time effects.

I watch this video at least once a week, It makes me feel like I'm a part of everything on this planet and universe.
I thank the author who helped me with some problems I had at the beginning to see it.
I wish there were more videos of this quality, everyone should watch it at least once in their life

developer_response.body:
Hello! There seems to be an occasional issue, where it only downloads after closing the application when the download failed to start, restarting the app and then hitting the download button again. Can you try that and report back if it solves the issue for you? Thank you. 
If not, please reach out to me at marc.zimmermann@epicscapes.de and we'll find a solution that works for you!

reviews.review_description: Even since I watched it the first time I've been obsessed with it, to this day I cannot believe that that is computer generated imagery, it feels way too real. This is easily the best thing I have experienced in VR. It's not just the imagery, the music, the inspirational speech, it's everything. Marc and the team have created something truly amazing, this and Deep States should be by default on every quest device. Worth every penny. Make sure to download it.

reviews.review_title: Makes you see the world with love
reviews.review_description:
This project celebrates life and existence in a unique way. 💜 

Make sure that you have at least 8,8GB of free space on your headset to be able to download the main content in-app.

reviews.review_title: Really cool, not your typical 360 video!
reviews.review_description: I've watched a bunch of videos on VR and very few seem to be made for VR from scratch. Some are meant for VR but aren't really amazing. Then this is on another level. It's not just a VR video but more like a 10 minute long experience. Definitely worth grabbing. I always show people new to VR this video first, since it's very impressive but requires nothing to be learned.

reviews.review_title: One of the most profound VR experiences
reviews.review_description: This one will leave you without words. It's a fantastic introduction for VR newcomers and a deeply touching take on life and its meaning. Can fully recommend this master piece of VR art. Thank you so much Marc, looking forward to seeing more releases from you on here.

This immersive short deserves 5 stars more than any other applications of its type. I don't give 5 stars just because the creators have not adapted the graphics to that of Metà Quest 3, and that is a real pity.

reviews.review_title: Great experience after I got it download
reviews.review_description:
Update - After following the developers suggestion to keep the headset awake while it downloads, I was able to get the content downloaded. The experience/short film is beautiful and inspiring! Marc and team have done a wonderful job. One star deducted for the problems with getting it downloaded.


Original review -I was really looking forward to this experience but unfortunately the in app content download never completes. I've tried several times, even reinstalling the app twice but the content download just stalls out everytime. At this point it's just been a waste of time and bandwidth.

developer_response.body:
Hi Number Nine,

Thanks for your review.
The latest update eliminates the need for downloading the big HQ-file in-app by delivering it in parts to the device during installation, since the is a 4GB file size limit on Meta's side. The update also adds three new voice-overs.

If you'd like to reconsider your rating that would of course be much appreciated.

Best regards,
Marc
